content.text: there are several common utility functions in the src/pages/OrganizationApplication/SupportProfile/SupportProfile.tsx and src/pages/OrganizationApplication/LegalEntity/LegalEntity.tsx relating to comparing and merging addresses. Can we pull this common functionality into useVerifySmartyAddress so that it is not duplicated across these components?

payload.message: there are several common utility functions in the src/pages/OrganizationApplication/SupportProfile/SupportProfile.tsx and src/pages/OrganizationApplication/LegalEntity/LegalEntity.tsx relating to comparing and merging addresses.
